items.author: @emollick
items.text: A fundamental problem with extending Codex/Cowork/Code to all knowledge work is that they remain very 'software-brained'... For a lot of other knowledge work, the process is at least as important as the outcome... This makes long-running models like Fable hard to use for deep knowledge work.

items.text: AISquared fine-tuned Bolt, a family of open-weight small language models, from Olmo. Domyn took a different route, building Domyn-Small, a 10B open-weight reasoning model, on its own Italia 10B base + our open Dolma & Dolci datasets. In AISquared's platform, Bolt now handles request routing & acts as a policy guardrail

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
new: i8 vectors

f32: 4 bytes/dim
i8: 1 byte/dim

4x fewer bytes → 75% lower storage and query costs + faster queries

when embedded with a quantization-aware model (e.g. voyage-4-large) trained on i8 vectors, recall loss can be ~0!

docs: https://turbopuffer.com/docs/performance

4x fewer bytes → 75% lower storage and query costs…

items.summary:
new: i8 vectors

f32: 4 bytes/dim
i8: 1 byte/dim

4x fewer bytes → 75% lower storage and query costs + faster queries

when embedded with a quantization-aware model (e.g. voyage-4-large) trained on i8 vectors, recall loss can be ~0!

docs: https://turbopuffer.com/docs/performance

items.text: LFM2.5-ColBERT-350M is a surprisingly reliable smart tool selector. We gave it 151 tools, and it consistently surfaces the 5 most relevant ones based on the user prompt. This saves tokens and improves accuracy. Ideal for hmmmm agentic edge models? 👀

items.author: @JayAlammar
items.text: The 30 billion parameter mixture of experts model stacks 49 Transformer blocks... The MoE layers have 128 experts, and activate 8 for each token. Leading to 3 billion active parameters. The self-attention setup interleaves sliding window attention and full attention in 3:1 ratio.

items.summary: The 30 billion parameter mixture of experts model stacks 49 Transformer blocks... The MoE layers have 128 experts, and activate 8 for each token. Leading to 3 billion active parameters. The self-attention setup interleaves sliding window attention and full attention in 3:1 ratio.

roundup.title: Sakana Fugu & GLM-5.2 Lead Agent Labs Wave
roundup.subtitle: 多代理编排系统与开源前沿模型集中发布
headline: @SakanaAILabs 发布 Fugu 多代理编排系统，单 API 调用即可访问 Fugu Ultra 模型，性能对标 Fable 与 Mythos，同时规避出口管制风险。@ValsAI 同时公布 GLM-5.2 在全榜单排名第 8，超越 Gemini 3.5 Flash。
@AnthropicAI 完成 Frontier Red Team Phase 2，Opus 4.7 独立完成 robodog 编程任务，速度比去年人类团队快约 20 倍。@matei_zaharia 同步更新 Omnigent 0.2，集成 Cursor CLI 与多沙箱提供商。
@vllm_project 与 @poolsideai 共同推动 Laguna M.1 上线，vLLM v0.21.0 实现 Day-0 支持，标志开源 agentic coding 模型进入生产部署阶段。@UnslothAI 则把 GLM-5.2 量化至 2-bit，Mac 本地运行成为可能。
@togethercompute 部署 NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 集群，专为大规模推理优化；@cursor_ai 推出 /automate 技能，让代理可一键配置触发器与工具链。

deepDives.title: Sakana Fugu 多代理编排系统发布
deepDives.summary: Sakana 推出单 API 调用的全栈多代理系统，强调编排而非单一巨模型，性能对标行业前沿。

facts.text: Fugu Ultra 模型在工程、科学与推理基准上与 Fable、Mythos 持平。
facts.quote: Fugu stands shoulder-to-shoulder with leading models like Fable and Mythos

facts.text: 系统通过单一模型 API 提供完整多代理编排能力。
facts.quote: A full multi-agent orchestration system accessible via a single model API

bullish.text: 下一代方向是编排而非更大模型

deepDives.title: GLM-5.2 开源模型与本地部署优化
deepDives.summary: Z.ai 发布 GLM-5.2，在公开 leaderboard 进入前沿梯队，多家工具链快速支持本地量化运行。

facts.text: GLM-5.2 在全榜单排名第 8，超过 Gemini 3.5 Flash。
facts.quote: GLM 5.2 scores higher than Gemini 3.5 Flash! ... ranks 8th

facts.text: 2-bit 量化后体积从 1.51TB 降至 238GB，准确率保留约 82%。
facts.quote: The 2-bit model retains ~82% accuracy after we shrunk it from 1.51TB to 238GB (-84% size)

bullish.text: 目前最强开源模型，可直接在 256GB Mac 运行

bullets.text: Omnigent 0.2 集成 Cursor CLI 与多沙箱提供商
LangSmith LLM Gateway 可防止代理单夜消耗超 $10k
bullets.quote: Your agents can burn through $10k overnight

bullets.text: Laguna M.1 为 225B 稀疏 MoE，23B 活跃参数，256K 上下文
bullets.quote: 70-layer sparse MoE: 225B total params, 23B active per token, 256K context

bullets.text: Cohere North Mini Code 4-bit 量化版支持 Mac 本地运行
Together AI 部署 NVIDIA GB300 NVL72 推理集群
Cloudflare Workers 支持代理秒级部署临时实例

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.text: vLLM v0.21.0 Day-0 支持 Laguna M.1 225B MoE 模型
topTweets.whyItMatters: 加速开源 coding agent 生产落地

takeaways: 多代理编排系统正成为新默认架构，单 API 调用即可获得前沿能力。
GLM-5.2 等开源模型已达 1M 上下文 + MIT 许可，本地量化部署成本显著下降。
Agent 框架需重点关注成本网关与沙箱隔离，避免单夜高额消耗。
vLLM、Ollama 等推理引擎对新 MoE 模型的 Day-0 支持速度加快。
硬件侧 GB300 NVL72 与消费级 Mac 集群并行发展，推理部署选择更多样。
